# TacosPortal for LLMs

TacosPortal is a .NET 8 prototype framework built with DevExpress XAF WebAPI, Blazor Server Interactive, Blazor WebAssembly, Telegram bot ingestion, and a claims-based security model integrated with the DevExpress Security System.

Main projects:
- TacosPortal: host app, services, Telegram integration, UI, API
- Core: business/domain classes and shared methods
- TacosPortalWebassemblyClient: WASM frontend

Key architecture:
- Telegram updates are forwarded into internal services rather than fully handled inline
- updates are normalized into relational entities
- background workers process persisted updates later
- DevExpress/XAF compatibility is a design priority

Important assumptions:
- SQL Server is the primary tested database target
- appsettings-based configuration is required
- DXChat may still be present even if public docs changed
- preserve custom security and service boundaries when editing

Recommended docs:
- AGENTS.md
- CLAUDE.md
- docs/ARCHITECTURE_FOR_AI.md
